# Safe-Spend
# https://safe-spend.dev
# Fiat-first escrow and spending control for AI agents

## Overview
Safe-Spend provides policy-based spending governance for autonomous AI agents. Fund a spending pool, define guardrails, and your agent spends within them — with every dollar, every decision, and every receipt logged.

## Key Features
- Segregated escrow accounts for AI agent spending
- Policy engine with per-transaction limits, daily/weekly/monthly caps, vendor allowlists, category restrictions
- Approval workflows with cascading authorization
- Complete audit trail for every transaction and policy decision
- SDK support for Python, TypeScript, and MCP
- Framework integrations: LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI SDK
- Dashboard for monitoring agent spending in real-time

## API
- Base URL: https://api.safe-spend.dev/v1
- Authentication: Bearer token (API key)
- Key endpoints:
  - POST /v1/spend — Create a spend request
  - GET /v1/escrow/:id — Get escrow account details
  - POST /v1/policies — Create a spending policy
  - GET /v1/transactions — List transactions with filtering
  - POST /v1/approvals — Request approval for exceeding policy limits

## SDKs
- Python: pip install safespend
- TypeScript: npm install @safespend/sdk
- MCP: npx @safespend/mcp-server

## Pricing
- Free: Up to 3 agents, $100/mo escrow cap, basic policies
- Pro: $49/mo — unlimited agents, $10,000/mo escrow, advanced policies, approval workflows
- Enterprise: $299/mo — custom limits, SSO, dedicated support, compliance reporting
